name: @eudi-verify/embed
description: <eudi-verify> Custom Element for EUDI Wallet verification

scripts.test:e2e: node -e "const p=process.env.EUDI_E2E_PORT||3333;const a=process.env.EUDI_MOCK_API_PORT||3456;console.log('\n📍 E2E widget:  http://localhost:'+p+'/');console.log('📍 Mock API:    http://localhost:'+a+'/api/eudi\n');" && playwright test
scripts.serve:e2e: node -e "const p=process.env.EUDI_E2E_PORT||3333;console.log('🚀 E2E widget server: http://localhost:'+p+'/');" && vite --logLevel info

author: eudi-verify contributors
